books.author: Robert Louis Stevenson
books.synopsis: A reclusive narrator recounts how his father’s inn became the setting for a dangerous encounter with a one-legged sailor and other suspicious visitors. As clues about hidden treasure surface, a struggle between trustworthy allies and ruthless pirates unfolds, culminating in a perilous search that tests loyalties and courage.

title.target: Dì yī zhāng: Lǎo hǎidào zài Bēnbǎo zhǔjiàng lǚguǎn
title.english: The Old Buccaneer: At the Admiral Benbow
